sprint.name: Sprint 1
sprint.goal: Compare token delivery approaches, validate Web Component-mounted subapp behavior, and keep governance documentation focused.

workItems.title: Harden proven PrimeNG families
workItems.summary: Prove low-risk PrimeNG families in Storybook and the /qa federation checkpoint.
workItems.includes: Button, Tag, Card, Table, Paginator, Dialog, Toast
workItems.doneCriteria: Storybook acceptance checks exist and /qa remains green.

workItems.title: Create Storybook acceptance checks
workItems.summary: Create acceptance stories for proven PrimeNG component families.
workItems.includes: Default, theme, a11y, stress, federation, and promotion checks
workItems.doneCriteria: Acceptance table is visible in Storybook guidance and /qa.

workItems.title: Track platform validation risks
workItems.summary: Keep token delivery, Web Component, overlay, and PrimeNG reintroduction risks visible and owned.
workItems.includes: Shadow DOM unknowns, overlay inheritance, blank hosts, token drift, route-critical fallback risk
workItems.doneCriteria: Each risk has an owner, affected area, mitigation, and next validation action.

workItems.title: Compare token delivery methods
workItems.summary: Compare how design tokens reach the shell, Web Component host, mounted subapps, PrimeNG, and documentation.
workItems.includes: Shared token package, shell global CSS, subapp bundled CSS, host-level CSS variables, PrimeNG preset mapping
workItems.blockerSummary: Token source and shell/subapp loading details still need validation against the production repositories.
workItems.doneCriteria: Token delivery decision diagram and token pipeline documentation explain options, tradeoffs, and validation questions.

workItems.title: Validate Storybook and Zeroheight developer experience
workItems.summary: Prove a small developer-focused workflow for Storybook evidence, token display, and Zeroheight governance guidance.
workItems.includes: Storybook evidence model, token display model, component status guidance, runtime ownership boundaries, repository validation checklist
workItems.blockerSummary: Needs repository access to replace assumptions with confirmed implementation details.
workItems.doneCriteria: Zeroheight remains a small guidance and evidence surface rather than a full page-build effort.

workItems.title: Citizen Services PrimeNG reintroduction
workItems.summary: Validate simple PrimeNG form controls through the direct remote and shell-mounted Web Component path.
workItems.includes: InputText, Select, checkbox/radio, overlay append behavior, token inheritance checks
workItems.blockerSummary: Route-critical PrimeNG hosts previously rendered blank in some remote compositions.
workItems.doneCriteria: InputText, Select, checkbox/radio, and supporting components pass direct remote, shell-mounted, overlay, and verify:fed checks.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Component renders with real PrimeNG internals and public-sector tokens.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Storybook story visible and no raw/blank host.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Neutral, vibrant, pastel, light, and dark are exercised.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Visual check plus pnpm verify:fed after promotion to /qa.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Labels, keyboard focus, and contrast are explicit.
acceptanceChecks.gate: A11y addon review and route-level axe pass.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Long text, empty data, loading state, or invalid state exists.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Story includes at least one non-happy-path state.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Candidate is verified directly and through shell composition.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Direct remote and shell route both render stable content.

acceptanceChecks.evidence: Component promotion status and validation evidence are updated after validation.
acceptanceChecks.gate: Status moves to Active or Proven only with Storybook, direct remote, shell-mounted, and accessibility evidence.

blockers.title: Blank/raw PrimeNG hosts
blockers.mitigation: Use stable native content first; promote only after direct and shell checks.

blockers.title: Overlay clipping and z-index
blockers.mitigation: Confirm appendTo/container behavior and verify token inheritance in shell-composed routes.

blockers.title: Manual token source
blockers.affectedArea: Token source, generated CSS, and Zeroheight export
blockers.mitigation: Create token JSON and generate CSS plus documentation artifacts from one source.

blockers.title: Form controls not reintroduced
blockers.mitigation: Reintroduce InputText and Select in /qa, then direct remote, then shell-mounted route.

timeEntries.note: Built acceptance stories for Button/Tag, Card, Table/Paginator, Dialog/Toast.
Mirrored acceptance stories into /qa and passed federation accessibility checks.
Created token JSON source model and generated tokens.css plus Zeroheight export.
Created focused Storybook and Zeroheight developer-experience guidance without building a full portal.
Added stress-state stories, federation readiness proof in /qa, and updated validation evidence for proven families.
Updated validation risks with owners, mitigations, and next actions after Sprint 1 promotion.
